  "active_set": ["R1.2", "R1.5", "R1.6", "RX.1", "RX.2", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "rationale": {
    "R1.2": "The artifact constructs a four-step causal chain (root mismatch → per-algorithm failure mode → post-hoc remedy limitation → proposed integrated approach); improving the draft requires verifying and tightening each premise-to-conclusion link, which is central but only load-bearing if the delegation extends beyond prose",
    "R1.5": "The four paragraphs follow a rough analytical arc but contain redundant self-referential framing ('throughout this paper/study', 'that we have been advancing') that blurs narrative momentum; reorganization or consolidation is likely expected but whether it is load-bearing depends on delegation scope",
    "R1.6": "The prose is severely degraded: every sentence chains subordinate clauses via 'which', hedges proliferate ('that we believe', 'that might be attempted'), and self-citations ('preceding section of this paper') are embedded mid-argument; polish is the most unambiguous and primary load-bearing responsibility under any reasonable reading of 'improve this draft'"
  },
  "clarification_needed": true,
  "clarification_question": "Should the revision be limited to prose clarity and concision—fixing run-on sentences, hedges, and redundant self-references while preserving the current paragraph order and argument structure—or should it also include restructuring the logical flow and reordering content to strengthen the analytical arc?"
}
